changeSet.author: Daniel A. Kolesnik
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE risk_metrics ( id serial, name character varying (127) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BASE', description text DEFAULT NULL, risk_model_id integer NOT NULL, formula_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_risk_metrics PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_to_risk_models FOREIGN KEY (risk_model_id) REFERENCES risk_models (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_to_formulas FOREIGN KEY (formula_id) REFERENCES formulas (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_to_users_created FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_to_users_updated FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_risk_metrics_name ON risk_metrics (name); CREATE INDEX i_risk_metrics_risk_model ON risk_metrics (risk_model_id); CREATE INDEX i_risk_metrics_created_by ON risk_metrics (created_by_id); CREATE INDEX i_risk_metrics_updated_by ON risk_metrics (updated_by_id);
